name: catbot
description: CatGo materials-science copilot: 60+ tools to read/write 30+ DFT, MD and quantum-chemistry file formats (VASP, QE, CP2K, ABACUS, ORCA, Gaussian, LAMMPS, CASTEP, SIESTA, OpenMX, ASE), build structures (slabs, adsorbates, moiré, nanotubes, heterostructures, MOFs, doping), generate ready-to-run input decks, author and run DAG workflows, submit & monitor HPC jobs, analyse (DOS/band/COHP/Gibbs/volcano), and query OPTIMADE + PubChem databases.
